title: Paint Night + Tapas
description: Start with cocktails at a midtown gallery, then head to a painting class where you and your date create matching canvases. End with late-night tapas downtown.

title: Piedmont Park Stroll + Rooftop Drinks
description: Morning walk through the Botanical Garden or pedal-boats at the park, followed by elevated cocktails at a rooftop bar with skyline views.

title: Salsa Social + Late-night Tacos
description: Free salsa lesson at 9:30 PM, then dance the night away at Atlanta's best Latin social. Cap it off with al pastor tacos from a food truck.
